slides.title: Do *more* over time
slides.body: More reps or more weight than last time.

slides.title: Log your *lifts*
slides.body: You can't beat what you don't write down.

slides.title: Add a little, *often*
slides.body: An extra rep or 2.5kg each week.

slides.title: Soreness isn't *progress*
slides.body: Chasing the pump is not overload.

slides.title: Rest equals *growth*
slides.body: Muscle is built on your days off.

slides.title: Overload *every week*.
slides.body: Vibe Health ties your training, protein and sleep together.
slides.cta_text: search ‘Vibe Health’ on the App Store
